title: (CARSON, Calif) – Assemblymember Mike A. Gipson, Chair of the Democratic Caucus, is announcing a Letter Writing Campaign in response to the recent vote by congressional republicans
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: The Affordable Care Act (ACA) has resulted in millions of Californians having comprehensive, affordable health coverage.
The ACA does not discriminate against people with pre-existing conditions.
1 in 6 Californians benefit from the Affordable Care Act (ACA).
Repealing and replacing the Affordable Care Act with Trumpcare could jeopardize healthcare for 5 million Californians.
